name: Kiyomaro, First to Stand
oracleText: Kiyomaro's power and toughness are each equal to the number of cards in your hand. As long as you have four or more cards in hand, Kiyomaro has vigilance. Whenever Kiyomaro deals damage, if you have seven or more cards in hand, you gain 7 life.

name: Ghost-Lit Raider
oracleText: {2}{R}, {T}: This creature deals 2 damage to target creature. Channel — {3}{R}, Discard this card: It deals 4 damage to target creature.
